headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight Rating on McKesson (MCK)
summary: McKesson Corporation (NYSE:MCK) is one of the Top 10 Strong Buy Stocks to Invest In. On June 10, 2026, Barclays lowered the firm’s price target on McKesson Corporation (NYSE:MCK) to $925 from $1,050 and maintained an Overweight rating on the shares. Barclays updated estimates and targets in the drug distributor space following recent results. The […]
